what_it_does: Creates the three shared collab-data tables for the Face Pipeline inlet: public.dna_tokens (design-token library: id slot, group_id, value, note, updated_at/by), public.design_seeds (label, partial_description, dna_ref, target_area, created_by, status, timestamps), and public.design_submissions (the inlet: seed_id FK set-null, submitted_by, bundle jsonb, readme, status ingested→registered, ingest_notes, created_at) with indexes on submissions. Registers all three in supabase_realtime, enables RLS, sets grants (service_role ALL, authenticated SELECT, no anon), and ensures pgcrypto.
observations: Maps to a 6-stage pipeline (board://item-c0a2d591): ① INGEST lands the export bundle in design_submissions; ②TAG/③COMPOSE/④VALIDATE/⑤RECONCILE/⑥REGISTER are company-side reads/writes; this migration owns the inlet + context reads
dna_tokens id is a CSS-var-style slot like '--acc'/'--sp-2'; group_id enumerated in comment (surface|signal|ink|node-type|type|living|shape)
design_seeds models the seed-react loop: a partial_description Tim reacts to plus a DNA reference; status open|designed|translated|registered
design_submissions.bundle is the framework-neutral HTML/CSS export tree as jsonb; status tracks ①→⑥ (ingested|tagged|composed|validated|reconciled|registered)
Header states reusable + model-independent (stands regardless of channel-sync sequencing); Supabase-side only, no company-side sync wired here
Same RLS-on/policies-deferred-to-0005/0006 posture and no-anon/no-broad-using(true) caution (C-1) as 0003
Claude Design's writes go through the Edge Function (service_role) scoped by client-registry posture, not direct client writes
Realtime add in a duplicate_table-catching DO block; idempotent DDL
standouts: The seed-react loop made data: a partial description + DNA that starts Claude Design halfway
design_submissions as the single inlet row whose status field is the pipeline's ①→⑥ progress tracker
Both sides read/write the SAME rows (shared collab data, not copies)
conventions: Idempotent DDL, DO-block realtime add, pgcrypto ensure
Self-describing comments tying columns to pipeline stages
concerns: status values on both seeds and submissions are free text enforced only by comment, not CHECK/enum — drift risk across the 6 stages
RLS enabled with no policies in-file means authenticated cannot read until 0005/0006 run (ordering dependency)
updated_at columns have defaults but no UPDATE trigger shown to maintain them
notes: The three shared Face-Pipeline tables — DNA tokens, seeds, and the submissions inlet — where Claude Design reads context and submits an export bundle whose status walks the 6-stage pipeline; RLS enabled, policies deferred.
questions: Are the seed/submission status enumerations validated outside comments?
Where is the company-side sync that reads these tables wired (a later migration / different system)?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches — implements the Face Pipeline inlet + context reads (tokens, seeds, submissions) exactly as the header describes, leaving stages ②→⑥ and policies to other files.
apparent_themes: staged pipeline with status as the progress spine
intention_signals: Provides the shared data surface where Claude Design is fed context (tokens + seeds) and lands its design export, so the company translate pipeline can pick it up and walk it through to registration — both parties on one set of rows.
novelty: Encoding the design handoff as shared DB rows with a status that is literally the pipeline stage pointer, and the DNA-token slot library as a first-class shared identity layer.
contribution: Brings the inlet and context data model of the Face Pipeline — the dna_tokens library, the design_seeds seed-react inputs, and the design_submissions bundle/status inlet that the connector and company pipeline both operate on.
summary_for_embedding: SQL migration creating public.dna_tokens, public.design_seeds, and public.design_submissions — the shared Face-Pipeline collab tables (DNA token library, seed-react inputs, export-bundle inlet with ①→⑥ status) with realtime and RLS enabled, policies deferred.
intention_for_embedding: To create the shared data inlet and context for Claude Design's design handoff so both the connector and the company pipeline work on the same seed/token/submission rows.
